inputs.name: study
inputs.description: Accept a PyCFD study spec defining parameter sweeps for residual analysis.

outputs.name: report
outputs.description: Return study report with trials, best parameters, and residual analysis.

provides.name: pycfd.study.run
provides.description: Run PyCFD parameter sweep studies for residual sensitivity testing.

requires.name: pycfd.compile
requires.description: Require script compilation for each trial.

requires.name: pycfd.execute.run
requires.description: Require executor for each trial run.

requires.name: pycfd.validate.report
requires.description: Require validator for each trial validation.
